titleStmt.title: SII 26.687: original edition by P. R. Srinivasan
No. 687. (A.R. No. 642 of 1909.) KŌNĒRIRĀJAPURAM, THANJAVUR TALUK, THANJAVUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: This inscription is damaged in some places. It contains the praśasti of the king commencing with Tirumaṉṉi vaḷara, etc.

It records that a certain Veḷḷāla (name lost) of Tirunallam, a Brahmadēyam in Veṇṇāḍu in Uyyakkoṇḍār-vaḷanāḍu, made a gift of 8 kāśu to the temple of the god [Ādi]tta-Īśvaram-uḍaiya-mahādēvar of the place. This money was received by the temple uvachchas named Pādaśivan Veṇkāḍa-Nakkamāṇi, [••••] śīrājan Mādēvan Tiruppugalūr and Varaguṇanaḷḷāṟan. In consideration of this money these uvachchas had agreed to play on drums and blow conches for a period of 3 nāḻi at the early morning service to the god of dance (Kūttapperumāḷ) in the temple of the god Tirunallamuḍaiyār.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tirumaṉṉivaḷara Irunilamaṭantaiyum poṟcceyappā
vaiyuñ cirttaṉic celviyun taṉ perunteviyarāki I
ṉpuṟaneṭutuyaruḻiyuḷ Iṭaituṟaināṭun tuṭarvanavelippaṭarva
na velippaṭar vanavāciyuñ cuḷḷicūḻ matiṭ koḷḷippākkaiyum na
ṇṇakkarumuraṇ maṇṇaikkaṭakkamum porukaṭaliḻattaraiyar tamu
ṭiyu māṅkavar teviyar Oṅkeḻil muṭiyu muṉṉavan paṟkkal teṉṉa
vaṉ vaitta cuntaramuṭiyu mintiraṉārThe letter r was inserted later.muntenkaṭaThe letter ṭa was inserted later.liḻamaṇṭala muḻutum
Eripaṭaikkeraḷan muṟaimaiyilc cūṭuṅ kulatanamākiya palarpuka
ḻ muṭiyuñ ceṅkatir mālaiyuñ caṅkatir velait tolperuṅkāval palapaḻantivum
ceruvilccinavi Irupattoru kālaraicukaḷai kaṭṭaparaicurāman mevaruñcāntimaṟṟi
vvaraṇ karuti Iruttiya cempoṟṟṟiruttaku muṭiyum Ilaṅkeśvaran vantaṭi vaṇaṅka
Iṉitaṅkirunta kopparakecaripanmarāna śrīrājentracoḻa devarkku yāṇṭu 7 Āvatu
Uyyakkoṇṭaār vaḷanāṭṭu veṇṇāṭṭu brahmadeyan tirunalla tta Īśvaramuṭaiya mahā
devarkku Uvaccakkāṇi Uṭaiya pātacivan veṇkāṭanakkamāṇiyum cirā[ja]num mātevan tiruppu
kalūrum varakuṇanaḷḷāṟanum Ivvaṉaivom Ivvūr veḷḷāḷan kā niṭaikkoṇṭa kācu 8 I
kkācu Eṭṭukkum Ittirunallamuṭaiyār koyil Āṭi Aruḷukiṉṟa kūttapperumāḷukku paḷḷieḻuccikoṭṭi maṭaṅkina pin
pu koyilil koṭṭakkaṭavakalaṉai Ellām kuṟaivaṟakoṇṭu caṅkumivarkaḷeḻuti muṉṟunāḻikaippotu
Āṭṭattukku cantirātittaval vācikkak kaṭavomākavum sabhaivilaikoṇṭārum Oṟṟikkoṇṭārum
vilaikoṇṭārum stitanapeṟṟārum maṟṟum Ikkoyil ko pukutu vārum Itu cantirātittaval
Āṭṭattukku vācikka kaṭavomāṉom Ivvaṉaivom Itu ceyvittavan makan paṭṭan kavaiya
ttevanen Itu panmāheśvararakṣai .—
Digital edition of SII 26.687 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
